message:
perf(ufunc): optimize matmul inner loops with cache-friendly access patterns

Restructure matrix multiplication inner loops in matvec, batched
matvec, and general matmul to use row-pointer caching and
accumulate-by-column patterns (a_val * b_row[j] += out[j]) instead
of per-element dot products. This improves cache locality by
streaming through B rows sequentially rather than striding across
B columns.

fnp-linalg: Use epsilon comparison for norm order matching (p==1.0
→ (p-1.0).abs() < EPSILON) to avoid floating-point equality issues.

Regenerate raptorq sidecar artifacts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
